# CapabilityNegotiation.MayInvokeRootsList method

A server MUST NOT invoke `roots/list` unless `roots` is present (R-6.2-i). Mirrors TS `mayInvokeRootsList`.

```csharp
public static bool MayInvokeRootsList(JsonObject clientCaps)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| clientCaps | The client's declared capabilities. |

## Return Value

`true` when `roots/list` may be invoked.
